title: Testing My Portfolio for Accessibility: What axe-core Found (and What It Didn't)
description: What happened when I added Playwright and axe-core to my portfolio site — the structural issues that surfaced, how I fixed them, and what automated testing still missed.

title: Setting Up Prettier with Tailwind CSS in a React Project (Without Forgetting Next Time)
